monitor_the_situation.title: US Launches Retaliatory Strikes on Bushehr Province, Iran
Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz After Striking Cargo Ship With Missile
— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 3h ago. Iran's IRGC Navy struck a commercial cargo ship with a missile and closed the Strait of Hormuz, a vital oil chokepoint, dramatically escalating tensions.
US Strikes Bandar-e Mahshahr, Iran with ATACMS Missiles
— S3 · Conflict · Mahshahr, Iran · 40m ago. An explosion has been reported in Mahshahr, Khuzestan Province, Iran, with no immediate details on the cause or casualties.
US HIMARS Rockets Launched From Bahrain Towards Iran
